label: stabilize immediate risk
instruction: confirm safe location, remove active threat, establish 24-hour check-in cadence.
exitCriteria: no active threat escalation in 24 hours.

label: secure housing continuity
instruction: activate housing partner and confirm temporary to stable unit path.

label: restore work rhythm
instruction: set weekly schedule and connect with workforce support.
exitCriteria: participant reports predictable routine for 2 consecutive weeks.

label: activate civic reciprocity role
instruction: assign renewal role and capture first verified contribution receipt.
exitCriteria: verified receipt logged and participant role active.
